node_94de9e42.title: Complaint filed against Debtor for non-payment

state.description: Plaintiff Tim has filed a formal complaint against debtor Andi for failing to pay the invoice after a reminder. The case is now pending court proceedings.
state.legal_issue: Non-payment and default leading to initiation of legal proceedings.

legal_references.extract: Der Schuldner kommt durch die Nichtleistung bis zum Ablauf einer Mahnfrist in Verzug.

node_94de9e42.summary: Plaintiff files complaint initiating court proceedings due to non-payment after reminder.

node_4915b61e.title: Response Submitted by Debtor

state.description: Debtor Andi has submitted a formal response to the complaint filed by plaintiff Tim. The content of the response addresses the claims of non-payment, either accepting, contesting, or justifying the situation. The case progresses to evaluation of the response by the court.
state.legal_issue: Debtor's formal response to complaint within procedural rules.

legal_references.extract: The defendant is required to respond to the complaint within a set deadline to participate effectively in the legal proceedings.
legal_references.summary: Confirms procedural requirement for response submission.

artifacts.title: Debtor's Response to Complaint
artifacts.content: Formal response submitted by debtor Andi addressing the complaint filed by plaintiff Tim regarding non-payment of the invoice.

references.extract: A hearing date is typically scheduled after the response to the complaint is received, allowing parties to prepare.
references.summary: Deadline for setting hearing after response.

deadlines.summary: Deadline by which the court must schedule a hearing date post response.

node_4915b61e.summary: Debtor Andi has submitted a formal written response to the complaint from plaintiff Tim, marking progression to the court's review of arguments.

node_a2245566.title: Court Sets Payment Deadline After No Response

state.description: After debtor Andi failed to respond to the complaint within the court-specified deadline, the court issued an order setting a new payment deadline of 15 days to settle the outstanding invoice with plaintiff Tim. The case awaits debtor's compliance with the court order.
state.legal_issue: Non-payment continues despite complaint and court order; debtor now under formal payment deadline for settlement.

legal_references.reference: § 331 ZPO - Court's power to set deadlines
legal_references.extract: Das Gericht kann Fristen setzen, um den Fortgang des Verfahrens zu sichern.
legal_references.summary: Court's authority to impose procedural deadlines.
